definition.title: Full-Featured Workflow
definition.description: A comprehensive playbook demonstrating every spec feature for conformance testing.
definition.system_prompt: You are a meticulous analyst. Always provide evidence-based reasoning with clear structure. Cite specifics rather than generalizations.

steps.title: Research
steps.content:
Research {{topic}} and identify the top {{max_items}} most important aspects.

For each aspect provide:
- A clear title
- A one-paragraph explanation
- Relevance rating (high, medium, low)

steps.label: 2a
steps.title: Deep Evaluation
steps.content:
Perform an exhaustive evaluation of each aspect of {{topic}} identified above.

For every item, provide:
1. Strengths with supporting evidence
2. Weaknesses and risk factors
3. Comparative analysis against alternatives
4. Long-term outlook (3-5 year horizon)

steps.label: 2b
steps.title: Quick Summary
steps.content:
Provide a brief summary table of the findings about {{topic}}.

| Aspect | Rating | One-Line Take |
|--------|--------|---------------|

steps.label: 2c
steps.title: Standard Evaluation
steps.content:
Evaluate each aspect of {{topic}} with balanced detail:
- Key strengths
- Key risks
- Recommendation

elicitation.prompt: Does the evaluation look accurate? Proceed to final report?

steps.title: Final Report
steps.content:
Synthesize everything into a final report on {{topic}}.

Structure the report with:
1. Executive Summary
2. Detailed Findings
3. Recommendations
4. Next Steps
